index.logged_in_select_menu: You're logged in. Select from the menu above.
login.account_disabled: Your account has been deactivated by an administrator. Please contact your system administrator for assistance.
login.failed_invalid: Invalid username or password. Please try again.
login.logged_out_inactive: You've been automatically logged out because you've been inactive for :minutes minutes. Click on the 'Log in' link to get back into the system.
login.rate_limited: You have exceeded the maximum login attempts. Please wait before trying again.
login.session_expired: You were logged out because your session expired. Log in again to continue.
maintenance.code_example:
# Example: Different role values
LDAP_ADMIN_ROLE=administrator
LDAP_MAINTAINER_ROLE=maintainer
maintenance.conflict.same_roles: Admin and Maintainer roles are both set to ':role'
maintenance.fix_body: Set different values for admin and maintainer roles/group names in your environment variables:
maintenance.restart_note: After fixing the configuration, restart the application for changes to take effect.
maintenance.why_body: The system detected that admin and maintainer roles/group names are set to the same values. This breaks the access control system because the system cannot distinguish between administrators and maintainers.
manage.dashboard.heading: Management Dashboard
manage.dashboard.lead: Welcome to the management dashboard. Select an area to manage:
manage.dashboard.quick_access_lead: As an organization administrator, you can quickly access your organization's management area:
manage.dashboard.role_mgmt_desc: Manage system roles and user assignments.
manage.dashboard.user_mgmt_desc: Manage system users, roles, and permissions.
manage.submenu.email_disabled: Email is disabled. Password reset and welcome emails are unavailable. Run the email verification (e.g. bin/verify-email.php) or check SMTP configuration.
manage.common.name: Name
manage.common.display_name_hint: Auto-filled from First Name + Last Name (you can edit it).
manage.common.email_username_hint: Email will be used as the username for login
manage.common.quick_add_lead: Add a new user to this organization. The email address will be used as the username for login.
manage.common.new_password_optional: New Password (leave blank to keep unchanged)
manage.org_users.modal.deactivate_body:
Are you sure you want to deactivate the user account for ?

Warning: This will prevent the user from logging in until the account is activated.
manage.org_users.modal.activate_body:
Are you sure you want to activate the user account for ?

This will allow the user to log in again.
manage.org_users.modal.delete_body:
Are you sure you want to delete the user ""?

Warning: This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated data.

Note: This will permanently delete the user account from this organization.
manage.org_users.email_reset_checkbox: Email password reset link (user sets a new password)
password.change.score_help: Current strength score: :score (0=Very Weak, 1=Weak, 2=Fair, 3=Good, 4=Strong). A score of :min or higher is required.
password.reset.message: If the address exists, a password reset link has been sent.
password.reset.lead: Enter your email address. If it exists in our directory, we will send you a link to set a new password.
password.set.success: Your password has been updated. You can now log in.
password.set.fail_admin: Failed to set password. Please contact an administrator.
setup.admin_password_prompt: Enter the LDAP admin or setup password to continue.
password.change.bullet1: Use this form to change your :org password. When you start typing your new password the gauge at the bottom will show its security strength. Enter your password again in the confirm field. If the passwords don't match then both fields will be bordered with red.
password.change.bullet2: Password Strength Requirement: Your password must achieve a strength score of :score (:level) or higher. The strength meter below will show your password's current score as you type.
oidc.callback.title: Authentication Error
oidc.callback.body: There was an error during the authentication process. Please try again.
manage.orgs.heading: Organization Management
manage.orgs.no_access_list: No organizations found or you don't have permission to view any organizations.
manage.orgs.ldap_conn_failed: Failed to connect to LDAP server. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.ldap_fail: LDAP connection failed. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.member_ok: Organization ':org' has been marked as a member organization.
manage.orgs.msg.member_fail: Failed to mark organization ':org' as member. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.unmember_ok: Organization ':org' has been removed from member organizations.
manage.orgs.msg.unmember_fail: Failed to remove organization ':org' from member organizations. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.perm_denied: Permission denied or invalid organization name.
manage.orgs.msg.deactivate_ok: Organization ':org' has been deactivated. All users in this organization are now inactive.
manage.orgs.msg.deactivate_fail: Failed to deactivate organization ':org'. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.activate_ok: Organization ':org' has been activated. All users in this organization are now active.
manage.orgs.msg.activate_fail: Failed to activate organization ':org'. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.delete_fail: Failed to delete organization ':org'. Please check the logs for details.
manage.common.msg.security_validation_fa: Security validation failed. Please refresh the page and try again.
manage.users.heading: System User Management
manage.users.system_users_only_body: This view shows only system-level users. Organization users are managed through their respective organization pages.
manage.users.msg.ldap_unavailable: LDAP configuration or connection is not available. Check that config is loaded and the LDAP server is reachable.
manage.users.msg.deactivate_fail: Failed to deactivate user ":user". LDAP Error: :error
manage.users.msg.activate_fail: Failed to activate user ":user". LDAP Error: :error
manage.users.msg.permission_denied_inval: Permission denied or invalid user identifier.
manage.users.msg.cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account.
manage.users.msg.delete_fail: User wasn't deleted. See the logs for more information.
manage.users.profile.heading: User Profile: :name
manage.users.msg.identifier_required: User identifier (UUID or account identifier) is required.
manage.users.roles_readonly_help: User roles are managed through group memberships and cannot be changed from this interface.
manage.users.read_only_body: You do not have permission to edit this user profile.
manage.users.new.heading: Create New System User
manage.users.new.system_user_body: This user will have system-wide access and will not be associated with any specific organization. System users can manage the entire system and all organizations.
manage.users.new.password_set_link_disab: Password set links are disabled because PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_SECRET is not configured.
manage.users.new.error.email_required: Email address is required and will be used as the account ID.
manage.users.new.error.password_set_link: Password set links are disabled because PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_SECRET is not configured.
manage.users.new.error.role_not_permitte: You do not have permission to create users with this role.
manage.roles.heading: System Role Management
manage.roles.global_roles_body: This page manages system-level roles (administrator, maintainer) for system users only. Organization user roles are managed within their respective organization pages.
manage.roles.org_roles_body_prefix: To manage roles for organization users, go to
manage.roles.org_roles_body_suffix: → select an organization → Users → manage individual user roles.
manage.roles.add.heading: Add System User to Role
manage.roles.remove.heading: Remove System User from Role
manage.roles.security_note_body: You cannot remove yourself from the administrators role as this would lock you out of the system.
manage.roles.global_roles_only_body: This section shows members of system-level roles only. Organization user role management is done within each organization's user management page.
manage.roles.admin_role_warning_html: ⚠️ Security Note: Removing users from the administrators role requires careful consideration. You cannot remove yourself from this role.
manage.roles.msg.cannot_remove_self_admi: You cannot remove yourself from the administrators role. This would lock you out of the system.
manage.roles.msg.add_fail: Failed to add user :user to role :role.
manage.roles.msg.remove_fail: Failed to remove user :user from role :role.
manage.orgs.show.no_roles_defined: No roles defined for this organization.
manage.orgs.show.modal.deactivate_body:
Are you sure you want to deactivate the organization ""?

Warning: Users in this organization will not be able to log in until the organization is activated.
manage.orgs.show.modal.activate_body:
Are you sure you want to activate the organization ""?

Effect: Users in this organization will be able to log in again (unless individually deactivated).
manage.orgs.show.modal.member_body: Mark the organization "" as a member organization?
manage.orgs.show.modal.delete_body:
Are you sure you want to delete the organization ""?

Warning: This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated users and data.

manage.users.index.modal.delete_body:
Are you sure you want to delete the user ""?

Warning: This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated data.
manage.users.index.modal.deactivate_body:
Are you sure you want to deactivate the user ""?

Warning: The user account will be inactive. The user will not be able to log in until the account is activated.

Note: This action is reversible. You can activate the user at any time.
manage.users.index.modal.activate_body:
Are you sure you want to activate the user ""?

Effect: The user account will be active again. The user will be able to log in.
account.request.error.validation_mismatc: The validation text didn't match the image.
account.request.error.first_name_require: You didn't enter your first name.
account.request.error.last_name_required: You didn't enter your last name.
account.request.errors_intro: The request couldn't be sent because:

First name: :first_name
Last name: :last_name
Email: :email
Notes: 

:notes

Create this account.
account.request.success_message: The request was sent and the administrator will process it as soon as possible.
account.request.error_message: Unfortunately the account request wasn't sent because of a technical issue.
account.request.form_intro: Use this form to send a request for an account to an administrator at :org.
account.request.form_approval_note: If the administrator approves your request they'll get in touch with you to give you your new credentials.
manage.orgs.add.msg.permission_create_or: You do not have permission to create organizations.
manage.orgs.add.msg.field_mappings_missi: Organization field mappings not configured. Please check LDAP configuration.
manage.org_users.msg.org_admin_group_cre: Failed to create organization administrators group: :error
manage.org_users.msg.removed_org_manager: User ":user" removed from Org Manager role.
manage.org_users.msg.cannot_remove_last_: Cannot remove the last Org Manager. At least one manager is required.
manage.org_users.msg.last_manager_toggle: Remove the last Org Manager: the manager group is deleted and recreated when you assign a manager again.
manage.org_users.msg.cannot_delete_org_m: This user is an Org Manager and cannot be deleted. Remove the Org Manager role first.
manage.org_users.msg.delete_fail_ldap: Failed to delete user. LDAP Error: :error
manage.org_users.msg.email_exists_in_org: A user with this email address already exists in this organization.
manage.org_users.msg.password_set_link_s: A password set link was sent by email.
manage.org_users.org_disabled_banner: This organization is currently deactivated. All users are inactive regardless of their individual status. The individual activate/deactivate controls below manage what happens when the organization is re-enabled.
manage.org_users.activate_tooltip_org_di: Remove individual deactivation. The user will remain inactive until the organization is re-enabled.
manage.org_users.deactivate_tooltip_org_: Individually deactivate this user. The user will stay inactive even when the organization is re-enabled.
